name: atoma-workspace
description: Atomic state management with universal persistence

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @atoma-js/shared run build && pnpm --filter @atoma-js/types run build && pnpm --filter @atoma-js/observability run build && pnpm --filter @atoma-js/core run build && pnpm --filter @atoma-js/runtime run build && pnpm --filter @atoma-js/client run build && pnpm --filter @atoma-js/atoma run build && pnpm --filter @atoma-js/backend-shared run build && pnpm --filter @atoma-js/backend-indexeddb run build && pnpm --filter @atoma-js/backend-http run build && pnpm --filter @atoma-js/backend-atoma-server run build && pnpm --filter @atoma-js/sync run build && pnpm --filter @atoma-js/react run build && pnpm --filter @atoma-js/server run build && pnpm --filter @atoma-js/devtools run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run check:runtime-protocol-boundary && pnpm build && pnpm --filter @atoma-js/shared run typecheck && pnpm --filter @atoma-js/observability run typecheck && pnpm --filter @atoma-js/core run typecheck && pnpm --filter @atoma-js/client run typecheck && pnpm --filter @atoma-js/types run typecheck && pnpm --filter @atoma-js/atoma run typecheck && pnpm --filter @atoma-js/react run typecheck && pnpm --filter @atoma-js/sync run typecheck && pnpm --filter @atoma-js/backend-shared run typecheck && pnpm --filter @atoma-js/backend-indexeddb run typecheck && pnpm --filter @atoma-js/backend-http run typecheck && pnpm --filter @atoma-js/backend-atoma-server run typecheck && pnpm --filter @atoma-js/server run typecheck && pnpm --filter @atoma-js/devtools run typecheck
scripts.check:sync-alias: bash -lc "if rg -n \"from '#sync/\" packages demo docs tests -g'!packages/plugins/sync/**'; then echo 'ERROR: #sync alias must only be used inside packages/plugins/sync.'; exit 1; fi"
scripts.check:runtime-protocol-boundary: bash -lc "if rg -n \"@atoma-js/types/protocol(-tools)?\" packages/runtime/src; then echo 'ERROR: @atoma-js/runtime must not import @atoma-js/types/protocol or @atoma-js/types/protocol-tools.'; exit 1; fi"

author: Rendevoz Team
